name: Rock Cornish Hens/Crockpot
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dry white or rose wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Quarter the red apple and core it. Dip each quarter into soy sauce.
2. Place one apple quarter in the cavity of each hen.
3. In a bowl, stir together the wine, marmalade, lemon juice, rind, salt, and pepper.
4. Brush this mixture over the hens.
5. Put the hens breast side down in a five-quart crockpot.
6. Pour the remaining sauce over all of the hens.
7. Cover and cook on low for 7 hours. (Baste the hens after three hours if possible.)
7. Serve the hens arranged on a heated serving platter with canned pear halves filled with prepared chicken-flavored stuffing mix, if desired.
